free_text: Total neutron cross sections at 1.44 eV

1 part indium, counted using Geiger counter.
BF3 detector used as beam monitor.
From data taken on Mg and MgO, Al and Al2O3, Si and
SiO2, and 56Fe and Fe2O3 samples. Data given is mean
